evals.prompt: Bootstrap embedded agent skills on our ADK agent: internal/skills package, skill toolset in main, no skills in the folder yet.
evals.expected_output: skills.go with go:embed skills and SkillToolset, main.go Toolsets wiring, empty skills/ directory ready for folders
assertions: Does not confuse with .agents/skills agent-tooling install path

evals.prompt: Add a deep-research embedded skill with instructions for multi-source literature-style research.
assertions: SKILL.md has YAML frontmatter with name and description
Does not require define on package

evals.prompt: Add two more embedded skills: code-review and summarize-meeting, each with its own SKILL.md.
evals.expected_output: Two sibling folders under internal/skills/skills/ with distinct frontmatter names
assertions: go:embed picks up new folders on rebuild
